page.title: Social Media Management - Facebook and Instagram Marketing | Manikam Dev Solutions
page.description: Professional Facebook and Instagram profile management. Content creation, advertising, engagement growth, and brand building on social media. Tailored strategies for your business.

hero.title: Social Media Management
hero.subtitle: Professional management of your Facebook and Instagram profiles. We create content that attracts, advertise your brand, and build a loyal community around your business. Increase engagement, reach, and sales through social media.

intro.title: Why is social media essential for your business?
intro.paragraph1: In 2024, over 4.9 billion people use social media - that's more than half of the world's population! Facebook and Instagram aren't just platforms for entertainment - they're powerful tools for growing a business, communicating with customers, and building a brand.
intro.paragraph2: Facebook and Instagram let you communicate directly with your target audience, build trust and loyalty, and turn followers into customers. Over 80% of Instagram users follow at least one business profile, while Facebook remains the most-used social network for B2C marketing.
intro.paragraph3: Professional social media management isn't a luxury - it's a necessity. Facebook's and Instagram's algorithms are constantly changing, and competition is fierce. You need a strategy that combines quality content, precise targeting, paid advertising, and continuous analytics to stand out and get results.

faq1.question: How often should I post content on Facebook and Instagram?
faq1.answer: We recommend a minimum of 3-5 times a week on Facebook and 4-7 times a week on Instagram (including Stories). Consistency is key - it's better to regularly post quality content than to sporadically post a large volume. Instagram Reels and Stories can be used more often since they have a shorter lifespan.

faq2.question: How long does it take to see results on social media?
faq2.answer: The first visible results (follower growth, increased engagement) usually appear after 1-3 months of consistent work. More significant results, such as increased conversions and sales, come after 3-6 months. Social media marketing is a marathon, not a sprint - it takes time to build an engaged community and establish a brand.

faq3.question: Do I need a budget for paid advertising?
faq3.answer: While it's possible to get results with organic content alone, paid advertising significantly speeds up growth. Organic reach on Facebook and Instagram has dropped dramatically (typically 1-6% of your followers see an organic post). We recommend a monthly ad budget of at least €100-200 for small businesses, €300-500 for medium-sized ones, and €500+ for large businesses.

faq4.question: What's the difference between organic and paid content?
faq4.answer: Organic content is anything you post without paying - it's visible to your followers and can appear in the Explore/Discover sections. Paid content (ads) lets you target a specific audience that may not follow your profile but matches your buyer persona. The best results come from combining both approaches.

faq5.question: Can I manage my own social media?
faq5.answer: You can, but professional management requires significant time, creative skills (design, copywriting, video editing), knowledge of algorithms and advertising platforms, analytics tools, and constant tracking of trends. Most business owners don't have the time or resources to manage social media well on top of running their business. We have a team of specialists and tools that guarantee results.

faq6.question: How do you measure success on social media?
faq6.answer: We track multiple metrics: follower growth, engagement rate (likes, comments, shares, saves), reach and impressions, click-through rate (CTR), website traffic from social media, lead generation, conversions, and ROI on ad campaigns. We focus on the metrics that directly impact your business, not just vanity metrics.

faq7.question: Do you work with platforms other than Facebook and Instagram?
faq7.answer: Our primary focus is Facebook and Instagram, since they're the most-used platforms in Serbia and the region, with the greatest potential for most businesses. These two platforms cover a wide range of demographics and industries. For specific needs, we can consider other platforms in agreement with the client.

faq8.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the content?
faq8.answer: We send you every piece of content for approval before it's posted. You can request changes and adjustments until you're fully satisfied. We make revisions until the content is perfect. Also, after the first month of working together, we get to know your brand and tone of voice, which results in content that fully matches your vision.
